text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 234 

TOT_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Total Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The total amount (rounded to whole dollars) of all charges (covered and non-covered) for all services 
provided to the beneficiary for the stay. 

SHORT NAME: TOTCHRG 

LONG NAME: TOT_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the total charge amount from
